arts.ttl: Exclusive: Tottenham to compete with Man City for €40-45m-rated Spanish defender
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester City are reportedly keen on signing the Lazio defender, Mario Gila, at the end of the season Sources have informed CaughtOffside that they will face competition from European heavyweights like Real Madrid, Bayern Munich and Paris Saint-Germain. arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola admits he’s been ‘unfair’ with Man City star
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola admitted he has been “unfair” with Man City winger Jeremy Doku in recent weeks. The Belgian winger has been restricted to substitute appearances in each of the Premier League champion’s last three games against Manchester United, Crystal Palace and Everton. Man City did manage to stretch the Toffees more when Doku came on […] The post Pep Guardiola admits he’s been ‘unfair’ with Man City star first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Man City battle for wonderkid 'comparable to Messi'
arts.sum: Lyon star Rayan Cherki has 'a talent comparable to Lionel Messi' and could become as good as Mesut Ozil, according to the club's long-time former president Jean-Michel Aulas and current captain Alexandre Lacazette. In fact, according to former Lyon president Jean-Michel Aulas and current captain Alexandre Lacazette, the youngster could become one of the world's best.
